message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.copy passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-p6qy)

Expose fnp_python.copy delegating to numpy.copy(a, order='K', subok=False)
with a parity oracle test covering:
- default order='K' deep-copy vs numpy (shares_memory=false)
- order='C' on a Fortran source -> C-contiguous layout
- order='F' on a C source -> F-contiguous layout
- order='K' preserves Fortran layout
- Python scalar (0-d) and list inputs
- object-dtype array copy surface parity
- subok=True type-name parity for plain ndarray
